user.title: Alfa Lebanon
user.description: Log in to alfa.com.lb in your browser. Open DevTools → Network → click any request to /en/account/getconsumption. In the Headers panel, copy the full value of the Cookie request header and paste it below.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Alfa
reauth_confirm.description: Your Alfa session expired. Re-paste the Cookie header from a fresh logged-in browser session.

error.invalid_auth: Cookie was rejected by Alfa. Make sure you copied the full Cookie header from a logged-in session.

abort.already_configured: This Alfa account is already configured
